title: Prevention of blastomycosis - Canada.ca
content:
## Prevention of blastomycosis
Learn how blastomycosis can be prevented.

## How can blastomycosis be prevented?
There is no vaccine to prevent blastomycosis.
In areas where the disease is common , it is not always possible to avoid exposure to the fungus that causes blastomycosis . This is because it is found in the soil and rotten wood near lakes and rivers where people:
People who have weakened immune systems (cannot fight disease easily) should avoid wooded areas where the fungus is widespread.
